projects.name: Busara AI
projects.description: A multi-agent data intelligence PWA running a multi-agent system across a 7-stage parallel DAG pipeline (v7.0). Ingest → Engineer → Detect → Forecast → Infer → Report. Real statistical algorithms, not wrapper code. Live at busaraai.com with a Free → Pro → Team → Enterprise tier (99.9% SLA).
highlights: 50 AI agents across 7 parallel DAG stages
Real statistical algorithms (Holt-Winters, OLS, K-Means++, GARCH)
Africa Market Intelligence agent (M-Pesa, AfCFTA, forex)

projects.name: KilimoPRO
projects.tagline: AI agricultural intelligence for 8 IGAD countries
projects.description: AI-powered agricultural intelligence for 8 IGAD countries (300M+ people). On-device crop disease detection (TFLite) for 15 crops, market forecasting with GARCH/VaR, multi-LLM advisory council in Swahili + English, 9 free keyless API endpoints, SMS webhook for feature phones. $0/month to operate — all 4 data sources free.
highlights: On-device crop disease detection for 15 crops (TFLite)
Multi-LLM advisory council in Swahili + English
$0/month operating cost — all data sources free

projects.name: Fraud Detection System
projects.tagline: Enterprise-grade real-time fraud scoring in Go
projects.description: A real-time transaction fraud scoring engine in Go — 7 statistical detectors (Z-Score, IQR, Velocity, Geo-Distance, Device Fingerprint, Merchant Risk, Behavioral Anomaly) fused by a weighted-vote ensemble, calibrated by logistic regression, overlaid with a deterministic rules engine. Scores in ~33 µs per transaction. Full case-management workflow, RBAC auth, Prometheus metrics, OTel tracing, and Slack alerts. 84% recall, 1.37% false-positive rate. Built for PCI-DSS / PSD2 / GDPR Article 22 compliance.
highlights: Full case management + RBAC + Prometheus + OTel
Postgres + Kafka + Stripe + Email/SMS + Grafana + retraining pipeline

projects.name: Verxlite
projects.tagline: Universal AI workflow agent for sales & ops
projects.description: A universal AI workflow agent for sales & ops teams. Automates post-meeting followups, lead assignment, support triage, approval routing, and weekly summaries across Gmail, Google Calendar, and HubSpot. Multi-tenant SaaS with real auth, OAuth, encrypted tokens, Celery workers, and Langfuse observability. Shipped with a transparent 281-defect code review and full P0/P1 remediation — 83 backend tests passing.
highlights: Multi-tenant SaaS with real auth (JWT + Clerk)
Google Workspace + HubSpot OAuth with token refresh
Fernet encryption for tokens at rest
Langfuse observability for every workflow step

projects.name: AgentReplay
projects.tagline: Deterministic replay for AI agents — zero model calls
projects.description: Deterministic replay and counterfactual debugging for AI agents. Captures every LLM call, tool response, clock read, and RNG draw — then replays the run bit-exact with zero model calls. 0.67% overhead, 100% reproduction fidelity, 99 tests. LangGraph-first. Backed by a research whitepaper.
highlights: LangGraph-first with adapters for OpenAI, Anthropic, CrewAI, AutoGen

projects.name: IntelliFlow
projects.description: 33-agent self-evolving multi-agent data intelligence platform. 7-stage pipeline (Ingest → Engineer → Detect → Forecast → Infer → Cluster → Report) with trajectory-based learning inspired by the AReaL paper. Turborepo monorepo, Next.js 15, TypeScript, 18 passing tests.
highlights: Foundation of the Busara AI platform

projects.name: Financial Forecasting Suite
projects.description: Production-grade time series forecasting toolkit for financial metrics. Holt-Winters, ARIMA/SARIMA, Prophet-style decomposition, ensemble forecasting with automatic model selection. 87.3% mean accuracy (1-MAPE) across 12 financial metrics with 12-24 month forecast horizons.

projects.name: Customer Segmentation Engine
projects.tagline: RFM + K-Means + GMM for actionable segmentation
projects.description: RFM analysis + K-Means + Gaussian Mixture Models for actionable customer segmentation. 6 optimal clusters (silhouette 0.42), 89% month-over-month stability, 23% increase in targeted campaign response rate. Built for financial services with 3D PCA/t-SNE visualizations.
